summary_one_line: Input must encode a colorspace/profile-class signature that _cmsEndPointsBySpace does not recognize, making it return FALSE.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte ICC colorspace/PCS signature field (offsets ~0x10-0x16, e.g. 'MCH5'/'Lab '/'MCH1'/'XYZ ') plus the device-class/profile field (offsets 0x0c-0x0f, 'prtr' vs 'mntr') must be set to a value whose colorspace Space=cmsGetColorSpace(hInput) is NOT among the spaces _cmsEndPointsBySpace handles, so it returns FALSE and the true (blocked) branch at line 93 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving vpc seeds carry varied, non-RGB colorspace signatures: 'MDHCXYZ', 'MCH5Lab ', 'MCH1XYZ ', 'MCH4Lab ', 'MY Lab ' at offsets 0x10+, and 'prtr' device class at 0x0c, exactly the offsets the BYTE DIFF flags as DIFFER (0x0c,0x0d,0x10,0x11,0x12). These exercise colorspaces _cmsEndPointsBySpace rejects, driving the true branch (W=10 T hits).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking value_profile seed is locked to the same 'mntr RGB XYZ ' header ('mntr' at 0x0c, 'RGB ' at 0x10-0x13), a recognized space for which _cmsEndPointsBySpace returns TRUE, so the loser only ever takes the false branch (L T=0 F=20 at line 93) and stays blocked across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which splices the exact 4-byte colorspace/class signature constants compared inside cmsGetColorSpace/_cmsEndPointsBySpace into the matching input-byte positions, letting vpc hit unrecognized-space signatures. Plain value_profile (havoc + token stack, no I2SRandReplace) cannot synthesize these multi-byte FOURCC literals and stays pinned at the RGB header.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true branch is the FALSE return of _cmsEndPointsBySpace at line 93.
Space is the colorspace signature read from the input profile.
Winner vpc seeds carry varied non-RGB colorspace/PCS signatures.
Winner seed uses prtr device class while losers use mntr.
Loser value_profile seeds are pinned to mntr RGB XYZ header.
The colorspace/class signature offsets differ decisively between W and L.
Loser blocks the true branch in all trials; winner resolves it.
value_profile_cmplog has the I2SRandReplace mutator that the loser lacks.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2336 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0cae0d2f5478842f` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 15 of the 16-level ancestor chain; tool reported 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 15.'

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only on a 4-byte unrecognized colorspace signature where plain value_profile resolves the true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), which would show the multi-byte FOURCC literal is reachable by CMP_MAP gradient alone.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact set of colorspaces _cmsEndPointsBySpace accepts vs rejects is inferred from seed byte patterns and source context, not from reading that function's body directly.
